item.title: Oh no! Shari'a Law!
item.description: Zohran Mamdani has turned down an 18% pay rise that would have brought his salary to $305,800. The same day, members of the city council voted to approve a pay raise for themselves and other officials.

item.title: Fucking Funny How "Judicial Independence" Gets Really Flexible Around Billionaires
item.description: One of the strangest fucking debates in modern politics is whether Supreme Court justices should accept lavish gifts from billionaires. Imagine explaining that sentence to someone in 1990. "Wait... that's... legal?" Judges are supposed to be independent. Not sponsored. If your highest court starts looking like an influencer posting "Thanks to my generous benefactors!" we've wandered into a parody of democracy. ⚖️ Notice how every proposal for stronger ethics rules is treated as some outrageous assault on the judiciary. No, Karen. The assault is creating a system where public trust depends on hoping nobody's yacht invitation influences anything. The rule shouldn't be controversial. Justice shouldn't come with complimentary vacations, luxury hospitality, or billionaire perks. If people lose faith that the referee is impartial, eventually they stop believing in the fucking game. ⚖️ #SupremeCourt #Ethics #JudicialIndependence #RuleOfLaw #Accountability #Democracy #Politics #Transparency
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Well hello, Miss Polite
item.description: @IsAHotdogASandwich is adopting Guillermo (who, as it turns out, is a girl, so she calls her “Gigi”), but I’m fostering her until she can get spayed. I had an absolute shit show of a day at work today and little Gigi is very patiently and politely waiting for sone pets. Look at her. Too cute. Oh, and I have sone update pictures and videos of Sweet Potato Casserole that I promise to post once I wake up from a quick(?) nap! Long day, short nap. That is the hope.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Distracting Distractions
item.description:
Tolkien once revealed that the Shire wasn’t pure fantasy. In a letter from 1955 he described it as: “more or less a Warwickshire village of about the period of the Diamond Jubilee.” The most beloved world in fantasy was built from ordinary English countryside memories.
~Orwell
A British sailor removes the shackles from a slave. (Great Britain, late 1800s)
item.dc:creator: ChoonahFish

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1750 (feeling wheel)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin! Pippin! Peekaboo!" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
